TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8

BIRTH_CNCPTN_IND 
LABEL: 
Birth to Conception Indicator — Latest in Year 
DESCRIPTION: A flag to identify children eligible through the conception to birth option, which is available only 
through a separate CHIP Program; most recent in the calendar year. 
SHORT NAME: BIRTH_CNCPTN_IND 
LONG NAME: BIRTH_CNCPTN_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
FILE(S): 
Annual DE base
